modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues connecting printer to wireless network in dorms

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to get my printer to work in the dorms, right? But I can't figure out how to connect it to the wireless network. It's super frustrating because I thought it would be easy, but now I'm not even sure if I should've brought a printer to school at all.
short_description: Issues connecting printer to wireless network in dorms
description: So, I was trying to get my printer to work in the dorms, right? But I can't figure out how to connect it to the wireless network. It's super frustrating because I thought it would be easy, but now I'm not even sure if I should've brought a printer to school at all.
